brand.name: Aquora
brand.positioning: Aquora is the Gulf's premium source for pool, spa, pond and fountain equipment — pairing genuinely engineered house product lines with the local expertise to specify, deliver and support them.
brand.logo_concept: A clean wordmark "AQUORA" set in a confident geometric sans, with the "O" reimagined as a precise ring whose lower arc thickens into a single curved water meniscus — reading at once as a droplet's surface, a pump impeller and a still pool seen edge-on. The mark works in deep aqua on light surfaces and reverses cleanly to white or warm-gold on the dark teal. The standalone "O" ring serves as a compact app icon and embossing motif, evoking precision engineering and calm water in one form.

value_props.title: Genuine Engineering
value_props.body: Every Aquora house product line is specified to real hydraulic and durability standards — not badge-engineered imports — so pumps, filters and controls perform exactly as rated.

value_props.title: Fast UAE-Wide Delivery
value_props.body: Stocked locally and dispatched across the Emirates and wider GCC, with priority fulfilment that keeps contractor schedules and pool seasons on track.

value_props.title: Expert Design & Installation
value_props.body: Our technical team sizes, specifies and installs complete filtration, circulation and automation systems tailored to your pool, spa, pond or fountain.

value_props.title: Dependable After-Sales Support
value_props.body: Genuine spares, clear warranties and responsive servicing mean your water systems stay running quietly and efficiently for years after purchase.

category.name: Pool Filtration
category.description: The heart of every clean, clear pool. Aquora's filtration range covers high-rate sand filters, low-maintenance cartridge systems, precision multiport valves and ultra-fine glass media engineered for Gulf water conditions and year-round operation. Whether you run a private villa pool or a hotel leisure deck, our filtration kit delivers crystal water with lower backwash and lower running costs.

products.title: Aquora SandStream Side-Mount Sand Filter
products.subtitle: High-rate side-mount sand filter for villa and light-commercial pools
products.description: A corrosion-proof, blow-moulded polyethylene vessel with a wound-glass-fibre reinforcement layer rated to 2.5 bar working pressure. The internal radial lateral system distributes flow evenly across the full bed depth for high-rate filtration down to 25-30 microns, while the wide bayonet lid gives quick access for media changes. Side-mount configuration leaves the tank top clear and is ideal where headroom is tight. Supplied tank-only; pair with an Aquora 6-position multiport valve.
products.image_hint: Blue-grey spherical sand filter tank with side-mounted multiport valve, studio shot on white background, pressure gauge visible

products.title: Aquora SandStream Pro Top-Mount Sand Filter
products.subtitle: Commercial-grade top-mount sand filter with stainless clamp band
products.description: Built for hotel, club and community pools running long duty cycles. The two-piece vessel is joined by a 316 stainless steel clamp band and gasket rated to 3.5 bar, with a moulded base flange for stable mounting on a plinth. A full-flow underdrain hub with 8 or 10 laterals delivers uniform bed loading and consistent backwash recovery. Sight glass and pressure gauge ports are integrated. Tank-only; specify a 2" multiport valve for flows above 20 m³/h.
products.material: Polyethylene vessel with 316 stainless clamp band
products.image_hint: Tall white commercial pool sand filter with stainless steel clamp band around the middle, top-mounted valve, on a concrete plinth

products.title: Aquora ClearCore Cartridge Filter
products.subtitle: Single-element cartridge filter for water-saving, low-backwash operation
products.description: A no-backwash cartridge filter that traps debris down to 15-20 microns across a large pleated polyester surface, cutting filtration water waste to near zero, a real advantage where supply is metered. The corrosion-proof vessel uses a stainless clamp lid and air-bleed valve for fast servicing; the element simply lifts out for hose-down cleaning. Larger surface area means lower flow velocity, longer service intervals and quieter, lower-head running than equivalent sand filters.
products.material: Polypropylene vessel, pleated polyester element, stainless clamp
products.image_hint: Cylindrical white cartridge pool filter with clear lid showing pleated cartridge element inside, air-bleed valve on top

products.title: Aquora ClearCore Quad Cartridge Filter
products.subtitle: Four-element cartridge filter for large residential and resort pools
products.description: Four pleated cartridges share the load to deliver up to 24 m² of filtration area in a single vessel, so flow velocity stays low and service intervals stretch out, often a full season between deep cleans. The oversized vessel handles up to 38 m³/h while filtering to 12-18 microns, ideal for large villa pools, infinity edges and small hotel decks where backwash water can't be wasted. Integrated drain port and air relief make end-of-season servicing straightforward.
products.material: Reinforced polypropylene vessel, four pleated polyester elements
products.image_hint: Large bulbous white cartridge filter vessel with stainless clamp band, four elements implied, 2.5 inch union connections at base

products.title: Aquora FlowSelect 6-Way Multiport Valve
products.subtitle: Six-position top-mount multiport valve for sand filters
products.description: The control centre of any sand-filter system, selecting Filter, Backwash, Rinse, Recirculate, Waste and Closed from a single lever. A glass-reinforced ABS body and a wear-resistant moulded rotor with a self-lubricating spider gasket give smooth, leak-free positioning over years of cycling. Integrated sight glass confirms backwash clarity and a pressure-gauge port lets you track filter loading at a glance. Available in 1.5" and 2" port sizes, top-mount or side-mount.
products.image_hint: Grey multiport pool valve with rotating top lever showing labelled positions, clear sight glass, six port outlets at base

products.title: Aquora FlowSelect Pro 2" Slide Valve
products.subtitle: Push-pull backwash slide valve for high-flow commercial filters
products.description: A two-position push-pull slide valve that switches between Filter and Backwash in one straight stroke, with far lower pressure loss than a rotary multiport, the preferred choice for high-flow commercial sand filters. The 316 stainless shaft rides on twin EPDM piston seals for a positive, drip-free seal under sustained duty. Full 2" bore keeps head loss minimal on pumps running at 40 m³/h and above. Solvent-weld or union connection options.
products.material: PVC body, 316 stainless shaft, EPDM seals
products.image_hint: Grey PVC push-pull slide valve with long T-handle shaft, two large bore pipe connections, industrial pool filtration look

products.title: Aquora PuraCryl Filter Glass Media
products.subtitle: Recycled activated glass media replacing traditional silica sand
products.description: An eco-friendly, activated glass media that drops straight into any sand filter and filters finer than silica sand, typically 5-10 microns, thanks to its angular, low-density grains and a negatively charged surface that helps capture fine particulates. Its smooth surface resists bio-fouling and channelling, so beds stay cleaner, backwash less often and use up to 20% less water. Lasts longer than sand and uses around 15% less media by weight for the same filter. Supplied in graded 25 kg bags.
products.image_hint: Close-up of pale blue-green crushed glass filter media grains spilling from a branded 25 kg bag, sparkling angular particles

products.title: Aquora SandStream Filter & Pump Bundle
products.subtitle: Matched sand filter, multiport valve and pump set for villa pools
products.description: A pre-matched filtration set that takes the guesswork out of sizing: a SandStream side-mount sand filter, a FlowSelect 6-way valve and a self-priming circulation pump correctly paired for flow and head. Everything is hydraulically balanced so the filter runs in its optimum velocity band, giving cleaner water and lower energy use than a mismatched build. Supplied with pump-to-valve unions and base; add glass media or sand to suit. Ideal for new villa pools up to roughly 90 m³.
products.material: Reinforced polyethylene filter, ABS valve, glass-filled pump body
products.image_hint: Pool equipment set photographed together: sand filter tank, multiport valve and a circulation pump on a pallet base, white studio background

category.name: Pool Pumps
category.description: The heart of every pool, spa, pond and water feature is its pump. Aquora supplies a complete range of variable-speed, circulation and booster pumps engineered for Gulf conditions, from compact villa systems to high-flow commercial and hospitality installations. Every model is selected for energy efficiency, corrosion resistance and quiet, dependable operation in high-ambient UAE climates.

products.title: Aquora Vortex VS Variable-Speed Pump 1.5 HP
products.subtitle: Permanent-magnet variable-speed pump for residential pools, up to 70% energy savings
products.description: The Vortex VS pairs a permanent-magnet (ECM) motor with a TEFC-rated enclosure to deliver precise flow control across eight programmable speeds. By matching pump speed to actual filtration, heating and cleaning demands rather than running flat-out, it typically cuts pump energy consumption by 50-70% versus a single-speed unit. The integrated keypad controller schedules up to four daily run cycles, and the oversized strainer basket reduces priming time on suction lifts common in below-deck plant rooms.
products.material: Glass-reinforced Noryl body with stainless 316 hardware
products.image_hint: Studio shot of a dark-grey and blue pool pump with a clear strainer basket lid and a digital keypad controller on top, three-quarter angle on a white background.

products.title: Aquora Vortex Pro VS Commercial Pump 3 HP
products.subtitle: High-flow variable-speed pump for hotels, communities and large residential pools
products.description: Built for hospitality and facilities duty, the Vortex Pro VS combines a 3 HP permanent-magnet motor with a heavy-duty self-priming volute rated for continuous operation in 45 C plant rooms. An onboard RS-485 interface allows integration with BMS and automation systems, while the digital drive holds flow steady against changing filter back-pressure for consistent turnover. The 8.5-litre see-through strainer pot extends service intervals on debris-heavy commercial systems.
products.image_hint: Large industrial-grade variable-speed pool pump in dark grey with a big transparent strainer pot and a black digital drive panel, photographed in a clean plant-room setting.

products.title: Aquora Current Circulation Pump 0.75 HP
products.subtitle: Reliable single-speed circulation pump for compact villa and spa systems
products.description: The Current is a self-priming single-speed circulation pump sized for small to mid villa pools, plunge pools and spa loops. Its corrosion-resistant thermoplastic body and ceramic-carbon mechanical seal stand up to chlorinated and lightly saline water, and the high-capacity leaf basket protects the impeller from coarse debris. Tool-free basket-lid removal makes routine priming and cleaning straightforward for owners and service technicians alike.
products.image_hint: Compact blue and grey single-speed pool circulation pump with a clear leaf basket, shown three-quarter on a plain white studio background.

products.title: Aquora Current Eco Low-Speed Circulation Pump
products.subtitle: Continuous-duty low-wattage pump for 24-hour filtration and water features
products.description: Designed to run around the clock, the Current Eco moves water at a steady, low velocity to keep filtration and sanitisation consistent while drawing a fraction of the power of a standard pump. The quiet two-pole motor and rubber-mounted base minimise vibration, making it well suited to spa loops, ornamental ponds and in-floor cleaning circuits. Its compact footprint fits tight plant cabinets and below-deck enclosures common in UAE villa builds.
products.image_hint: Small, low-profile energy-efficient circulation pump in light grey with a green accent and rubber-mounted base, clean product shot on white.

products.title: Aquora Thrust Booster Pump 0.75 HP
products.subtitle: Dedicated pressure-side booster for automatic pool cleaners
products.description: The Thrust booster supplies the high-pressure water needed to drive pressure-side automatic cleaners, keeping cleaning performance independent of the main filtration pump. A high-head impeller design generates strong, consistent thrust so the cleaner reaches steps, walls and deep ends reliably. The compact, sealed motor housing is rated for outdoor pump pads, and the clear union fittings simplify in-line installation alongside the existing return plumbing.
products.image_hint: Compact black and grey booster pump with clear union fittings on both ports, sleek motor housing, shown at a three-quarter angle on white.

products.title: Aquora Cascade Fountain & Feature Pump
products.subtitle: High-pressure booster pump for fountains, water blades and sheer-descent features
products.description: The Cascade is engineered to deliver the stable head pressure that fountains, water blades and sheer-descent features demand for a clean, uniform sheet of water. Its multi-stage impeller stack builds pressure efficiently while the noryl body and silicon-carbide seal resist wear from continuous operation and minor grit. Selectable models cover everything from a single villa water wall to multi-jet landscape fountains, and the unit runs quietly enough for courtyard and lobby installations.
products.image_hint: Slim elongated multi-stage centrifugal pump in dark grey with horizontal in-line ports, photographed cleanly on a white background to emphasise its high-pressure design.

products.title: Aquora Vortex VS Salt Marine-Grade Pump 2 HP
products.subtitle: Variable-speed pump hardened for saltwater and chlorinated-brine systems
products.description: Purpose-built for saltwater chlorination and coastal installations, the Vortex VS Salt uses a fully non-metallic wet end and titanium-coated hardware to resist the accelerated corrosion seen in brine and humid Gulf air. The permanent-magnet drive runs at low speed for everyday turnover and ramps up only for backwashing or feature duty, balancing longevity with energy savings. An IP55 drive enclosure protects electronics in exposed seafront and rooftop plant areas.
products.image_hint: Corrosion-resistant variable-speed pump in white and teal with a sealed IP55 drive box and titanium-look fasteners, set against a subtle coastal-toned background.

products.title: Aquora Titan VS High-Flow Commercial Pump 5 HP
products.subtitle: Heavy-duty variable-speed pump for resort, aquatic and large feature systems
products.description: The Titan VS is Aquora's largest variable-speed offering, built for resort pools, aquatic centres and high-volume commercial water features where turnover demands are significant. Its cast bronze volute and oversized 12-litre strainer handle sustained high-flow duty, while the inverter drive trims energy use during off-peak and overnight cycles. Standard RS-485 and dry-contact inputs allow it to slot directly into pool automation and building management systems for scheduled, demand-based operation.
products.material: Cast bronze volute, 316 stainless shaft and hardware
products.image_hint: Large heavy-duty commercial pool pump with a bronze-toned volute, flanged connections and a wall-mounted inverter drive unit, photographed in an industrial pump room.

category.name: Pool Heating
category.description: Extend your swimming season across the UAE's cooler months with Aquora pool heating engineered for Gulf conditions. From whisper-quiet full-inverter heat pumps to compact electric heaters and titanium heat exchangers, every unit holds a precise water temperature efficiently against high ambient humidity and hard, mineral-rich water. Practical, durable and serviceable, sized correctly for villa pools, hospitality projects and commercial facilities alike.

products.title: Aquora ThermaCore Inverter Heat Pump 9kW
products.subtitle: Full-inverter heat pump for small villa and plunge pools up to 30m³
products.description: A full-DC inverter heat pump that modulates compressor and fan speed to match demand, delivering quiet, stable heating with a coefficient of performance up to 13 at A26/W26 conditions. The titanium tube heat exchanger resists chlorinated and saline water, while the corrosion-treated aluminium fin coil suits humid coastal air. Ideal for plunge pools and compact villa pools, holding setpoint within ±0.5°C overnight.
products.material: Titanium tube heat exchanger, ABS cabinet, coated aluminium coil
products.image_hint: Compact white side-discharge inverter pool heat pump on a clean tiled plant deck, single fan grille, wired digital controller, soft daylight

products.title: Aquora ThermaCore Inverter Heat Pump 13kW
products.subtitle: Mid-range full-inverter heat pump for villa pools up to 50m³
products.description: Built around a DC-inverter rotary compressor and EVI vapour-injection circuit, this unit sustains output even on cool desert winter mornings. The titanium-in-PVC heat exchanger and hydrophilic blue-fin coil handle UAE humidity and condensation without premature corrosion. A wired touch controller manages setpoint, timer and quiet-mode scheduling, making it the default choice for most standard villa pools.
products.material: Titanium-in-PVC heat exchanger, ABS cabinet, blue-fin coil
products.image_hint: Mid-size white inverter pool heat pump beside a villa pool pump room, single large fan, condensation drain, bright morning light

products.title: Aquora ThermaCore Inverter Heat Pump 21kW
products.subtitle: High-output full-inverter heat pump for large villa and family pools up to 80m³
products.description: A high-capacity full-inverter unit with a twin-rotor DC compressor and large-surface titanium exchanger for fast heat-up on bigger water volumes. The wide-pitch coil and variable-speed axial fan reduce noise and frost build-up, while the corrosion-coated casing is rated for coastal salt-laden air. Suited to large villa pools and small lap pools that need rapid recovery after refill or cold snaps.
products.material: Titanium tube heat exchanger, galvanised-coated steel base, ABS panels
products.image_hint: Large white inverter pool heat pump with wide single fan on a concrete plinth next to a big villa pool, three-phase cabling, clear sky

products.title: Aquora ThermaCore Commercial Inverter Heat Pump 35kW
products.subtitle: Three-phase full-inverter heat pump for hospitality and commercial pools up to 140m³
products.description: Engineered for hotels, clubs and facilities pools, this commercial inverter platform pairs dual DC-inverter compressors with a heavy-gauge titanium exchanger for continuous duty in high ambient heat. Independent refrigerant circuits allow staged modulation and redundancy, so a single fault need not take the pool offline. Cascade-ready control lets multiple units be linked for larger or multi-pool sites.
products.material: Heavy-gauge titanium exchanger, powder-coated steel cabinet
products.image_hint: Large grey commercial twin-fan pool heat pump on a rooftop plant area of a hotel, ducting and 3-phase isolator nearby, industrial setting

products.title: Aquora PulseHeat Electric Pool Heater 9kW
products.subtitle: Compact inline electric heater for fast top-up and small pools
products.description: An inline electric flow heater with an Incoloy 825 element and a robust engineered-polymer body that resists chlorinated and salt-chlorinated water. A built-in differential flow switch and over-temperature cut-out prevent dry firing, while the digital thermostat holds water within ±1°C. Ideal as a primary heater for plunge pools and spas, or as a rapid booster alongside a heat pump on cooler days.
products.image_hint: Compact cylindrical inline electric pool heater with digital display mounted on white PVC pipework in a tidy pump room

products.title: Aquora PulseHeat Electric Pool Heater 18kW
products.subtitle: Inline electric heater for spas and mid-size villa pools
products.description: A higher-output inline electric heater using twin Incoloy 825 elements within a titanium-lined chamber for long service life in aggressive Gulf water chemistry. The digital controller offers setpoint, flow interlock and remote-enable terminals for integration with pool automation. A strong choice where gas is unavailable and rapid, controllable heat is needed for spas, jacuzzis and mid-size villa pools.
products.material: Titanium-lined chamber, Incoloy 825 elements, polymer end caps
products.image_hint: Cylindrical inline electric pool heater with backlit controller and stainless clamps on grey pipework, clean technical plant room

products.title: Aquora TitanFlo Tube Heat Exchanger 40kW
products.subtitle: Titanium shell-and-tube exchanger for boiler or solar-fed pools
products.description: A horizontal shell-and-tube heat exchanger that transfers heat from a building boiler, solar thermal loop or chiller-reject circuit into the pool without mixing the two waters. The titanium tube bundle and PP-GF composite shell tolerate chlorinated and saline pool water at high flow, while the threaded primary ports suit standard plant connections. A clean, low-maintenance way to heat a pool from an existing hot-water source.
products.material: Grade 2 titanium tubes, glass-filled polypropylene shell
products.image_hint: Horizontal cylindrical titanium pool heat exchanger with blue composite shell and four threaded ports, mounted on a bracket against a plant-room wall

products.title: Aquora TitanFlo Tube Heat Exchanger 75kW
products.subtitle: High-capacity titanium exchanger for large and commercial pools
products.description: A larger-bore shell-and-tube exchanger sized for villa pools heated from a boiler or for light commercial duty. The dense Grade 2 titanium tube bundle delivers high transfer efficiency and total resistance to chloride pitting, and the reinforced composite shell handles continuous flow. Mounting brackets and union tails are included for straightforward plant-room installation.
products.material: Grade 2 titanium tubes, glass-filled polypropylene shell, stainless brackets
products.image_hint: Large horizontal titanium shell-and-tube pool heat exchanger with blue casing and union connections on a steel mounting frame in a commercial plant room

category.name: Pool Cleaning
category.description: Everything required to keep your pool, spa or water feature spotless, from autonomous robotic cleaners to professional-grade manual tools. Aquora cleaning equipment is engineered for Gulf conditions, handling fine desert dust, high evaporation rates and heavy bather loads with reliable, low-maintenance performance. Whether you manage a single villa pool or a hospitality portfolio, every line is built to clean faster and finish cleaner.

products.title: Aquora GlideBot X7 Robotic Pool Cleaner
products.subtitle: Fully autonomous floor, wall and waterline cleaning for residential pools
products.description: A self-contained robotic cleaner that operates independently of your pool's filtration, driven by twin brushless drive motors and an active gyroscopic navigation system for systematic, overlap-free coverage. Dual fine and ultra-fine cartridge filters capture everything from leaves down to 2-micron desert dust, while the powered wall-climbing tracks scrub right up to the tile waterline. A weekly scheduler and tangle-resistant swivel cable make unattended cleaning genuinely hands-off.
products.material: ABS housing with PVA active brushes
products.image_hint: Sleek dark-blue and grey robotic pool cleaner sitting on white pool steps, water droplets on housing, clean minimal studio background

products.title: Aquora GlideBot C12 Commercial Robotic Cleaner
products.subtitle: Heavy-duty autonomous cleaner for hotel, club and public pools
products.description: Built for large hospitality and facility pools, the C12 runs extended cleaning cycles with a high-capacity 9-litre debris canister and a 32 m³/hr pump for aggressive pickup of grit and biofilm. Four-wheel drive with a tracked climbing system handles tiled walls, gentle slopes and deep ends up to 25 m, and the supplied caddy lets staff move and store the unit between sessions. An onboard hour counter and filter-full indicator simplify scheduled maintenance across a venue.
products.material: Reinforced polypropylene chassis with stainless fasteners
products.image_hint: Large industrial robotic pool cleaner in dark grey on a stainless transport caddy beside a hotel lap pool, professional setting

products.title: Aquora Undertow Suction Pool Cleaner
products.subtitle: Filtration-powered automatic floor cleaner with no electronics
products.description: A reliable suction-side cleaner that connects to your skimmer or dedicated suction line and uses your existing pump to crawl the pool floor and lower walls. A single moving diaphragm part drives random-pattern movement, so there is little to wear or service, and the adjustable flow valve tunes performance to your pump's output. Supplied with weighted, UV-stabilised hose sections sized for pools up to 10 m.
products.material: UV-stabilised PVC hose with TPR diaphragm
products.image_hint: White and teal suction pool cleaner with ribbed hose coiled beside it on pale tiles, clean product shot

products.title: Aquora Cyclone Pressure Pool Cleaner
products.subtitle: Booster-driven cleaner with its own debris bag for heavy leaf loads
products.description: Connected to a dedicated pressure return line, the Cyclone uses jet thrust to drive itself across the pool while a venturi creates upward suction into an onboard debris bag, keeping leaves and grit out of your filter and skimmer baskets. Large pneumatic wheels and a wide intake throat make light work of palm debris and bougainvillea fall common to Gulf gardens. Best paired with a booster pump for consistent thrust and coverage.
products.material: Composite body with mesh debris bag
products.image_hint: Three-wheeled pressure pool cleaner in grey and orange with mesh leaf bag attached, on poolside paving

products.title: Aquora ProCurve Wall & Floor Brush
products.subtitle: 18-inch curved-back brush for fast manual scrubbing
products.description: A professional 18-inch brush with a moulded curved back that hugs cove transitions between wall and floor, so you scrub corners in a single pass. Dual rows of medium-stiff polypropylene bristles lift algae film and dust without scratching plaster or vinyl, and the weighted aluminium back keeps the head pressed to the surface. A universal EZ-clip collar fits any standard Aquora telepole.
products.image_hint: Curved-back pool brush with blue bristles and silver aluminium body, isolated on white

products.title: Aquora Stainless Algae Brush
products.subtitle: Hard-bristle brush for stubborn algae on concrete and gunite
products.description: For concrete, gunite and unpainted plaster pools, this brush combines stainless-steel and nylon bristles to break up entrenched black-spot and waterline algae that softer brushes leave behind. The corrosion-resistant 304 stainless wire is interleaved with nylon to protect the surface finish while still delivering real abrasion. Not recommended for vinyl or fibreglass. Fits all Aquora telepoles via the EZ-clip collar.
products.image_hint: Compact pool brush with silver stainless and white nylon bristles, close-up on grey background

products.title: Aquora DeepBag Leaf Rake
products.subtitle: Heavy-duty deep-net skimmer for floor and surface debris
products.description: A robust leaf rake with a moulded EZ-glide front lip that slides flat along the pool floor to scoop sunken debris without snagging. The deep, fine-mesh net bag holds a large volume of leaves, blossom and grit between empties, and the anodised aluminium frame resists the corrosion that chlorine and salt chemistry cause over time. Equally effective skimming floating debris from the surface.
products.material: Anodised aluminium frame, fine polyester mesh
products.image_hint: Deep mesh pool leaf rake with silver aluminium frame and black net, angled product shot on white

products.title: Aquora FlatSkim Surface Net
products.subtitle: Lightweight flat skimmer for daily surface debris
products.description: A flat hand skimmer for quick daily passes, lifting leaves, insects and surface film before they sink and stain. The taut fine-mesh net dries fast and resists clogging, and the lightweight reinforced-nylon frame stays rigid without weighing down the pole. An everyday tool for villa owners and pool staff alike, sized to clear surface debris in minimal strokes.
products.material: Reinforced nylon frame, fine polyester mesh
products.image_hint: Flat rectangular pool skimmer net with blue frame and black mesh resting on poolside, clean shot

category.name: Water Treatment
category.description: Keep every body of water crystal-clear, balanced and safe with Aquora's complete water treatment range. From salt chlorination and UV disinfection to precision dosing, professional test kits and pool-grade chemicals, our systems are specified for the demands of UAE villas, hospitality projects and large commercial installations. Engineered for hard Gulf water and high bather loads, with reliable parts support across the Emirates.

products.title: Aquora SaltPure R Series Salt Chlorinator
products.subtitle: Self-cleaning reverse-polarity salt chlorination for residential pools
products.description: The SaltPure R Series produces fresh chlorine on demand by electrolysing low-salinity pool water, eliminating the need to store and handle liquid or tablet chlorine. A titanium electrode coated with mixed metal oxide delivers consistent output, while automatic reverse-polarity cycling dissolves scale to extend cell life in hard Gulf water. The clear-housing cell allows visual inspection, and a built-in flow and temperature sensor cuts production when circulation drops.
products.material: Titanium MMO-coated electrode, transparent polycarbonate cell housing
products.image_hint: Wall-mounted white salt chlorinator control unit with digital display beside a transparent inline electrolytic cell on white pool pipework, studio lighting

products.title: Aquora SaltPure C Series Commercial Chlorinator
products.subtitle: High-output salt chlorination for hotels, clubs and shared pools
products.description: Built for sustained duty on hospitality and community pools, the SaltPure C Series runs dual high-capacity titanium cells to maintain free chlorine under heavy bather loads. An integrated ORP and pH controller modulates output in real time against a target setpoint, reducing chemical overshoot and operator intervention. Marine-grade terminals and a powder-coated steel enclosure stand up to humid plant-room conditions, and Modbus output allows integration with BMS platforms.
products.material: Dual titanium MMO electrodes, powder-coated steel enclosure
products.image_hint: Large grey industrial salt chlorination panel with two inline cells mounted on a pool plant-room wall, conduit and pipework visible

products.title: Aquora ClearRay UV-C Disinfection System
products.subtitle: Chemical-free UV-C sterilisation to cut chlorine demand
products.description: ClearRay passes circulating water through a 316L stainless steel chamber housing a high-output UV-C lamp that inactivates bacteria, viruses and chlorine-resistant pathogens such as Cryptosporidium. Used alongside a residual sanitiser, it allows lower chlorine levels for gentler water on skin and eyes. A quartz sleeve isolates the lamp from the flow, and a lamp-life countdown with alarm prompts timely replacement before UV dose drops below spec.
products.image_hint: Polished stainless steel cylindrical UV-C water treatment chamber with union fittings and a small control box, glowing blue UV indicator, white background

products.title: Aquora DosaFlow Peristaltic Dosing Pump
products.subtitle: Precision peristaltic metering for pH and chlorine dosing
products.description: The DosaFlow peristaltic pump delivers accurate, repeatable chemical injection without valves that clog or vapour-lock on outgassing solutions like sodium hypochlorite. The self-priming Santoprene tube tolerates acid and chlorine dosing, and tool-free tube replacement keeps maintenance fast. Configurable as proportional, timed or sensor-driven, it pairs with the DosaFlow controller for closed-loop pH and ORP regulation.
products.material: Santoprene peristaltic tube, PP pump head
products.image_hint: Compact white-and-blue peristaltic dosing pump with transparent tube head and digital control face, wall-mounted, dosing line into pipework

products.title: Aquora AquaSense Digital Pool Photometer
products.subtitle: Lab-grade digital water testing in seconds
products.description: AquaSense replaces guesswork colour-matching with a sealed-optics photometer that reads free and total chlorine, pH, cyanuric acid, alkalinity and calcium hardness to laboratory tolerance. Pre-programmed methods and reagent tablets guide each test step by step on a backlit display, and results log to date-stamped memory for handover records on managed pools. The waterproof case and supplied reagent starter pack make it ready for poolside or plant-room use.

specs.label: Parameters
specs.value: FC, TC, pH, CYA, TA, Ca hardness

products.image_hint: Handheld yellow-and-grey waterproof digital pool photometer with glass test vial inserted, reagent tablets and case beside it, clean white surface

products.title: Aquora AquaSense Liquid Test Kit
products.subtitle: Reliable 5-way drop test for everyday balance checks
products.description: A dependable manual kit for routine checks, the AquaSense 5-way tester measures free chlorine and pH by OTO and phenol-red comparison, plus alkalinity, calcium hardness and cyanuric acid by titration. The moulded comparator block holds generous sample volumes for clear colour reads, and UV-stable reagents resist the fading common in Gulf storage conditions. Supplied in a hard case with full reagent set and a quick-reference balance chart.
products.material: Moulded ABS comparator block, glass reagent bottles

specs.label: Tests
specs.value: FC, pH, TA, Ca hardness, CYA

products.image_hint: Open hard plastic case with a two-chamber liquid test comparator block, rows of small reagent dropper bottles and a colour chart, top-down view

products.title: Aquora ChlorShield Stabilised Chlorine Granules
products.subtitle: Fast-dissolving stabilised chlorine for daily sanitation
products.description: ChlorShield granules deliver 56% available chlorine as sodium dichloroisocyanurate, a near-neutral pH formulation that won't shock pool balance the way calcium hypochlorite can. The built-in cyanuric acid stabiliser shields chlorine from rapid UV burn-off under intense Gulf sun, extending residual between doses. Quick-dissolving and low-residue, it can be broadcast directly or pre-dissolved for vinyl and fibreglass pools.
products.image_hint: White plastic tub of white chlorine granules with blue Aquora label and scoop, lid open showing granules, on a clean grey surface

products.title: Aquora BalancePro pH Minus
products.subtitle: Dry acid pH reducer for safe, controlled correction
products.description: BalancePro pH Minus uses sodium bisulphate to lower pH and total alkalinity without the handling hazards of liquid hydrochloric acid, making it far safer for villa owners and facilities staff to store and dose. The free-flowing granules dissolve cleanly with minimal dust, ideal for the elevated alkalinity typical of GCC mains and well water. Pre-dissolve and add over the return, then retest after one full turnover.

specs.label: Dose guide
specs.value: ~10 g per 1,000 L to drop pH 0.1

products.image_hint: White tub of fine white pH-reducer granules with a teal Aquora BalancePro label, measuring scoop, against a soft neutral background

category.name: Pool Lighting
category.description: Transform any pool, spa or water feature into an after-dark centrepiece with Aquora's underwater lighting range. From precision-engineered flat-face LED fixtures and dynamic RGB control systems to safety-rated transformers, every component is built for the heat, humidity and chlorinated water of the Gulf. Specified by villa owners, contractors and hospitality estates across the UAE for reliable, low-voltage performance and effortless scene control.

products.title: Lumina Flat-Face LED Underwater Light — Cool White
products.subtitle: Slim 316L-faced fixture delivering crisp white illumination for concrete and liner pools.
products.description: The Lumina Flat-Face is built around a high-CRI cool-white LED array sealed behind a chemically-toughened glass lens and a 316L stainless face ring, giving a flush, low-profile finish against the pool wall. Potted to IP68 with a dual O-ring seal, it runs on safe 12V AC and dissipates heat through the metal body for a rated 50,000-hour service life. The 2.5m tinned cable feeds back to a deck junction box, and the niche-mount design suits both wet-niche concrete shells and surface-mount liner installations.
products.material: 316L stainless steel face ring with toughened glass lens
products.image_hint: Slim circular stainless-faced underwater LED light glowing crisp white against a dark blue pool wall, water surface ripples above

products.title: Lumina RGB PAR56 Underwater Light
products.subtitle: Full-colour LED retrofit sized to the universal PAR56 niche.
products.description: A direct drop-in for standard PAR56 wet niches, this RGB fixture packs 252 LEDs across red, green and blue channels to produce a deep, saturated colour field and smooth fades. The flat ABS-reinforced face sits flush in the niche and the bonded lens resists UV yellowing and pool chemicals. Colour and scene selection are driven over the standard two-wire power line by an Aquora controller, so no extra data cabling is needed for retrofit projects.
products.material: Reinforced polymer body with UV-stable polycarbonate lens
products.image_hint: Round PAR56-style underwater light casting vivid magenta and blue colour through clear pool water

products.title: Nitro Mini LED Spotlight
products.subtitle: Compact 50mm accent light for steps, benches and water features.
products.description: The Nitro Mini is a 50mm-diameter spotlight designed for accenting steps, swim-out benches, spa shells and feature walls where a full-size fixture is overkill. The marine-grade brass housing and tempered lens give it the corrosion resistance needed for chlorinated and saline water, while a tight 30-degree beam picks out detail without glare. Multiple units run in parallel off a single low-voltage transformer for clean, even step lighting.
products.material: Marine-grade brass housing with tempered glass lens
products.image_hint: Tiny brass underwater spotlight set into a pool step, casting a focused warm beam underwater

products.title: Spectra RGBW Surface-Mount Light
products.subtitle: Four-channel colour-plus-white fixture for liner and fibreglass pools.
products.description: Spectra adds a dedicated white channel alongside RGB, so a single fixture delivers both true white task lighting and full-spectrum colour scenes without the muddy whites of three-channel units. The surface-mount bracket fixes directly to the pool wall, making it ideal for fibreglass and liner shells with no wet niche. A thick silicone gasket and resin-potted driver protect the electronics, and the 3m cable terminates in a sealed gland for safe deck routing.
products.material: Anodised aluminium body with bonded acrylic lens
products.image_hint: Square surface-mounted underwater light blending white and teal light across a fibreglass pool wall

products.title: Spectra Wi-Fi RGB Controller
products.subtitle: App-driven scene and colour control for up to eight fixtures.
products.description: This DIN-rail RGB controller drives up to eight Aquora colour fixtures over a single low-voltage circuit, with synchronised colour, brightness and pre-set scenes managed from the Aquora app or any home-automation system over Wi-Fi. Onboard scene memory holds twelve programmable looks, and dry-contact inputs allow integration with existing wall switches or pool timers. The sealed enclosure is rated for plant-room and outdoor cabinet mounting in Gulf ambient temperatures.
products.image_hint: Compact DIN-rail RGB pool controller with status LEDs and a phone showing a colour-scene app beside it

products.title: Pulse Inline RGB Sequencer
products.subtitle: Wireless-remote power-line controller for PAR56 colour lights.
products.description: The Pulse Inline sequencer sits between the transformer and the lighting circuit, modulating the power line to drive standard two-wire RGB fixtures with no extra data cable, the ideal retrofit for existing PAR56 installations. A weatherproof handheld remote selects from preset colour-change programmes, fixed colours and adjustable fade speed. Memory retention holds the last scene through power cycles, so the pool returns to its set look after a pump-timer shutdown.
products.image_hint: Small sealed inline controller box with wires, paired with a weatherproof colour-change remote on a poolside surface

products.title: VoltGuard LED Pool Transformer
products.subtitle: Safety-isolated low-voltage supply for underwater LED circuits.
products.description: VoltGuard steps mains down to a safe 12V for underwater LED lighting using a toroidal core for quiet, efficient operation and a thermal cut-out that protects the winding under sustained Gulf-summer load. The IP65 steel enclosure carries a sealed gland plate and an internal earth bar, and the secondary is fully isolated to meet wet-area wiring requirements. Capacity is sized in VA so installers can match transformer headroom to total fixture wattage with margin to spare.
products.material: Powder-coated steel enclosure, toroidal copper core
products.image_hint: Grey IP65 steel transformer enclosure with cable glands, mounted on a plant-room wall

products.title: VoltGuard 12V DC LED Driver
products.subtitle: Constant-voltage regulated driver for DC underwater fixtures.
products.description: For Aquora's DC fixtures such as the Nitro and Spectra ranges, this constant-voltage driver delivers a clean, regulated 12V DC with active short-circuit, overload and over-temperature protection. Power-factor-corrected switching keeps it efficient and cool, and the fully potted, resin-filled body is rated IP67 for direct mounting near the waterline or in a damp plant room. Dimmable output allows brightness scenes when paired with an Aquora controller.
products.image_hint: Black resin-potted LED driver brick with output leads, IP67 sealed, on a clean white surface

category.name: Spa & Wellness
category.description: Engineered comfort for the modern Gulf home and hospitality estate. Aquora's Spa & Wellness range covers acrylic spa tubs, dry and steam saunas, commercial-grade steam generators, hydromassage jet systems and air blowers, all specified for demanding UAE conditions. Each product is selected for thermal efficiency, low-maintenance operation and a genuinely premium finish.

products.title: Helios 5-Seat Acrylic Spa Tub
products.subtitle: Cast-acrylic family spa with balanced therapy seating and full insulation.
products.description: The Helios is a five-seat freestanding spa built on a 6mm reinforced cast-acrylic shell over an ABS backing, giving long-term resistance to UV yellowing and Gulf heat soak. A full-foam insulation package and an insulated locking cover hold heat efficiently against high ambient temperatures, while the dedicated lounger seat and varied jet zones target neck, lumbar and calf groups. Plumbing is sized for a single 2.0kW circulation-and-heat path with a separate booster pump for therapy jets.
products.material: Cast acrylic shell with ABS backing
products.image_hint: Freestanding charcoal-grey acrylic spa tub with curved lounger seat, water and soft underwater LED glow, on a clean villa terrace at dusk.

products.title: Tidal Dual-Zone Swim Spa
products.subtitle: Counter-current swim channel paired with a separate hydrotherapy zone.
products.description: The Tidal combines a 4.5m swim channel with an isolated seated therapy zone, letting one user swim against an adjustable counter-current while others relax at a different temperature. Twin variable-speed swim pumps drive a wide, smooth current through three flush-mounted nozzles, with flow tuned by a digital controller rather than fixed restrictors. The marine-grade stainless frame and full-foam cabinet are specified for year-round outdoor use in coastal UAE installations.
products.image_hint: Long rectangular swim spa with a swimmer mid-stroke against a visible current, separate seating end with jets, modern poolside setting in daylight.

products.title: Cedar Cabin Dry Sauna (4-Person)
products.subtitle: Pre-fabricated Nordic-style sauna in aromatic cedar with a 6kW heater.
products.description: A four-person dry sauna supplied as a pre-cut, tongue-and-groove cabin in low-resin cedar, chosen for its low heat conductivity and natural aroma. The 6kW stainless heater carries a thermal-overload cut-out and stone basket for controlled load, paired with an external digital controller offering set-temperature and 0-8 hour delay timing. Twin-bench layout with backrests and a recessed LED strip make it suitable for both villa and boutique-spa fit-outs.
products.image_hint: Warm-lit cedar sauna interior with two tiered benches, a stone-topped heater in the corner and soft recessed lighting, photographed through the open glass door.

products.title: Vapora 9kW Steam Generator
products.subtitle: Compact residential steam unit with auto-drain and descaling cycle.
products.description: The Vapora 9kW drives a tiled steam room of up to 12 cubic metres, generating steam within roughly 60 seconds of start-up via a stainless heating tank with dual self-cleaning elements. An automatic post-session drain and scheduled flush cycle reduce limescale build-up, which is essential given the hard water common across the UAE. The unit ships with a waterproof digital control panel, steam outlet and an aroma port for essential-oil dosing.
products.image_hint: Compact stainless steam generator box mounted on a plant-room wall with a digital control panel beside it and a steam outlet pipe, clean technical product shot.

products.title: Vapora Pro Commercial Steam Generator
products.subtitle: Continuous-duty steam plant for hammams, gyms and hotel spas.
products.description: The Vapora Pro is built for back-to-back hospitality cycling, with a heavy-gauge stainless tank, two independent heating banks and a level-probe system that maintains output without dry-firing. Continuous-feed and auto-flush operation keeps it running across long opening hours, and a BMS-compatible controller allows integration with hotel management systems. Specified for large hammam and wet-spa rooms where reliability and serviceability are the priority.
products.image_hint: Large industrial stainless steam generator in a hotel plant room with conduit and pipework, robust commercial unit, neutral technical lighting.

products.title: Aurea Stainless Hydromassage Jet Set
products.subtitle: Directional stainless jets for built-in spa and plunge-pool walls.
products.description: The Aurea jet set provides six adjustable hydromassage nozzles in AISI 316 stainless steel, designed to be built into concrete or fibreglass spa and plunge-pool walls. Each jet offers a swivelling ball face for directional aim and an air-venturi intake that blends air into the water stream for a stronger massage feel. The 316-grade body and seals are specified to resist chlorinated and lightly saline water over long service life.
products.image_hint: Close-up of polished stainless steel hydromassage jets mounted in a tiled spa wall underwater, water streams visible, crisp detail shot.

products.title: Zephyr 700W Spa Air Blower
products.subtitle: Quiet-running air blower for floor bubble systems and spa aeration.
products.description: The Zephyr 700W blower feeds floor and bench air channels to create a fine-bubble effervescence across the spa base, separate from the water jets. A sealed, thermally protected motor and an integrated check valve prevent water back-flow into the unit, while an optional in-line air heater takes the chill off incoming air during cooler desert nights. Compact mounting and low-vibration housing make it straightforward to retrofit into existing spa plant.
products.image_hint: Small cylindrical spa air blower unit in dark housing with inlet and outlet ports, shown beside spa pipework, clean product photo on light background.

products.title: Serene Infrared Cabin (2-Person)
products.subtitle: Low-energy far-infrared sauna with full-spectrum carbon panels.
products.description: The Serene is a two-person infrared cabin using full-surface carbon-fibre far-infrared panels that warm the body directly at lower air temperatures than a traditional sauna, with markedly lower energy draw. Panels are zoned across back, calf and floor areas and run from a single 230V socket, making it suitable for apartments and indoor villa rooms without three-phase supply. The hemlock cabin includes a chromotherapy LED, glass front and a digital touch controller.
products.image_hint: Modern light-timber infrared sauna cabin with full glass front, two interior benches and soft colour-therapy lighting, set in a clean indoor wellness room.

category.name: Fountains & Water Features
category.description: Engineered water-feature equipment for villas, hotels and public landscapes across the Gulf. From precision spray nozzles and submersible feature pumps to fully synchronised light-and-music control systems, the Aquora Fountains range is built to perform reliably in hard water and high ambient temperatures. Every component is corrosion-rated for continuous Middle East operation and specified for clean, predictable water effects.

products.title: Aquora CascadeJet Adjustable Spray Nozzle
products.subtitle: Solid-brass single-tier spray nozzle with field-adjustable angle
products.description: A machined solid-brass spray nozzle producing a dense, aerated single-tier crown that holds its shape in light wind. The adjustable swivel base allows the spray angle to be tuned from 15 to 30 degrees on site without tools, and the wide internal bore resists blockage from debris and scale common in GCC water. Threaded BSP connection seats directly onto standard manifold risers.
products.image_hint: Polished brass fountain nozzle on white background, angled to show internal bore and swivel base, studio product shot

products.title: Aquora FoamCrown Aerated Geyser Nozzle
products.subtitle: High-volume foaming jet for bold white-water columns
products.description: An aerating geyser nozzle that draws surrounding water through side ports to produce a thick, brilliant-white foam column that reads strongly in daylight and floodlight. Because the effect is volume-driven rather than pressure-driven, it tolerates minor level variation and remains stable in breezy courtyard settings. The oversized throat is engineered to pass small debris without clogging, reducing maintenance in open-air features.
products.image_hint: Stainless steel aerating geyser fountain nozzle showing six side intake ports, three-quarter studio view on neutral grey

products.title: Aquora TierFan Cluster Fan Nozzle
products.subtitle: Multi-orifice fan nozzle for layered display tiers
products.description: A precision-drilled cluster nozzle that throws a graduated fan of fine streams to build the classic layered tier of a formal fountain. Each orifice is countersunk to keep the streams laminar over their full arc, giving crisp, glass-like jets rather than ragged spray. Supplied with a calibration shim set so the fan width can be matched to the basin geometry during commissioning.
products.image_hint: Circular brass fan nozzle with a ring of angled stainless jets, top-down and side composite product photo

products.title: Aquora HydroCore Submersible Fountain Pump
products.subtitle: Continuous-duty submersible pump for display fountains
products.description: A continuous-duty submersible pump built around a thermally protected asynchronous motor and a non-clog vortex impeller, sized for medium to large display fountains. The epoxy-encapsulated stator and 316 stainless shaft are specified for permanent immersion in chlorinated and mineral-rich Gulf water. A pre-fitted strainer cage and 10 m sealed cable allow drop-in installation without a dry pump chamber.
products.image_hint: Stainless steel submersible fountain pump with strainer cage and sealed cable, clean studio shot on white

products.title: Aquora DriveLine Dry-Mount Fountain Pump
products.subtitle: End-suction surface pump for plant-room fountain circuits
products.description: An end-suction centrifugal pump for fountains plumbed from a remote plant room, where a dry, serviceable installation is preferred over submersion. The cast bronze-fitted casing and mechanical carbon-ceramic seal handle continuous recirculation duty, while the close-coupled IE3 motor keeps the footprint compact. Flanged ports and a drainable casing simplify winter shutdown and seasonal servicing.
products.image_hint: Close-coupled end-suction surface pump with blue motor and flanged ports, industrial product photo on light grey

products.title: Aquora RingFlow Stainless Manifold Ring Kit
products.subtitle: Pre-fabricated circular nozzle manifold for ring displays
products.description: A pre-welded 316 stainless ring manifold supplying an evenly spaced set of riser bosses for symmetric circular fountain displays. Each boss is bushed to accept Aquora CascadeJet or TierFan nozzles, and the central feed flange balances pressure around the loop so every jet matches in height. The kit ships with adjustable feet and levelling brackets to set the ring true on an uneven basin floor.
products.image_hint: Circular stainless steel fountain manifold ring with evenly spaced nozzle bosses and levelling feet, overhead studio shot

products.title: Aquora LumenRing Submersible LED Ring Kit
products.subtitle: RGBW submersible light ring for nozzle and tier features
products.description: A submersible RGBW LED ring designed to sit beneath a nozzle manifold and uplight the water column from within the spray footprint. The fully potted 316 stainless housings carry tempered glass lenses and run on safe 24 V DC, with each fixture independently addressable for colour sweeps and chase effects. Supplied with a weatherproof junction box and DMX-ready driver so it integrates directly with an Aquora controller.
products.image_hint: Submersible LED ring with twelve coloured stainless light fixtures glowing blue and magenta, dark moody product shot

products.title: Aquora MaestroSync Light & Music Controller
products.subtitle: DMX fountain controller synchronising pumps, lights and audio
products.description: A programmable show controller that choreographs fountain pumps, valve banks and LED lighting against a music timeline for synchronised water shows. An onboard audio input with beat-detection drives real-time colour and jet sequencing, while saved scenes can be triggered by schedule, contact closure or the supplied app. The IP55 wall enclosure carries relay and 0-10 V outputs for variable-speed pumps plus a dedicated DMX512 universe for LumenRing fixtures.
products.image_hint: Wall-mounted grey fountain control panel with display screen, terminal blocks and DMX ports, front-facing product photo

category.name: Ponds & Water Features
category.description: Aquora's pond and water-feature range gives you the moving parts behind a clear, healthy, well-lit feature, from energy-efficient circulation pumps and pressurised filtration through to skimmers, submersible lighting and welded liners. Every component is specified for Gulf conditions, with UV-stabilised materials, salt-tolerant finishes and serviceable internals that hold up through a Dubai summer. Whether you are building an ornamental koi pond, a planted reflection pool or an architectural cascade, the parts are sized to match and built to be maintained, not replaced.

products.title: EcoFlow Vario Variable-Speed Pond Pump
products.subtitle: Asynchronous-motor circulation pump with infinitely adjustable flow
products.description: The EcoFlow Vario uses a brushless asynchronous motor with electronic speed control, letting you dial flow from a gentle planted-pond trickle up to full cascade duty without changing the pump. Solids-handling impeller passes particles up to 8 mm, so it runs filters, streams and waterfalls without constant clearing. A dry-running cut-out and thermal overload protect the motor, and the IPX8 sealed housing is rated for continuous submersion. Designed for 24/7 operation, it draws a fraction of the power of a fixed-speed unit at part-load.
products.image_hint: Black submersible pond pump with cage-style solids screen and orange Aquora accent, shown on white background with coiled cable

products.title: PureStream Pressurised Pond Filter
products.subtitle: Sealed multi-stage filter with integrated UV clarifier and backwash
products.description: PureStream is a fully pressurised canister filter, so it can sit below water level or be hidden behind the feature and still push clean water up to a raised stream or waterfall. Mechanical foam stages trap debris while a high-surface-area bio-media bed hosts nitrifying bacteria for biological clarity. The integrated UV-C clarifier knocks out single-cell algae to keep the water green-free, and a single-lever backwash valve clears the foams without opening the lid. A clog indicator on the lid tells you when a backwash is due.
products.image_hint: Green pressurised pond filter canister with clamp lid, backwash lever and twin hose connections, studio shot on white

products.title: SurfaceClear Floating Pond Skimmer
products.subtitle: Self-adjusting floating skimmer for leaves, pollen and surface film
products.description: SurfaceClear floats on the pond surface and follows changing water levels, drawing the top layer of water through a wide intake to strip out leaves, blown sand, pollen and oily surface film before they sink and rot. A removable debris basket holds the catch and lifts out without tools for emptying. It connects to any external or submersible pump and works alongside a pressure filter to cut maintenance and improve gas exchange. The low-profile float and weighted base keep it stable in wind.
products.material: UV-resistant ABS float, stainless mesh basket
products.image_hint: Round floating pond skimmer with dark float ring and central debris basket, photographed at slight angle on white

products.title: Lumora Submersible LED Spotlight Set
products.subtitle: Warm-white underwater spotlights with transformer and splitter
products.description: The Lumora set lights cascades, planting and feature walls from below the waterline with three fully submersible LED spots running on safe 12 V. Each head has a tempered-glass lens and an anodised, salt-tolerant aluminium body sealed to IP68 for permanent submersion. The supplied low-voltage transformer and quick-connect splitter make installation tidy, and the adjustable mounting feet let you aim each beam. Warm 3000 K output gives a natural, non-clinical glow that suits stone and water.
products.image_hint: Three small stainless underwater LED spotlights on stake feet with transformer and cable splitter, warm glow, on white

products.title: AquaSeal EPDM Pond Liner
products.subtitle: Flexible 1.0 mm rubber membrane for ponds and water features
products.description: AquaSeal is a flexible EPDM synthetic-rubber membrane that moulds to any pond profile, including planting shelves and tight cascade steps, with no welding required on site. At 1.0 mm thick it resists punctures, UV and the temperature swings of an exposed Gulf installation, and it stays elastic for decades rather than going brittle like cheap PVC. It is fish- and plant-safe once rinsed, and offcuts can be joined with AquaSeal seam tape and primer for larger features. Supplied cut to your ordered size.
products.image_hint: Roll of black EPDM rubber pond liner partially unrolled to show flexible matte surface, on white background

products.title: Cascade Pro High-Head Waterfall Pump
products.subtitle: High-lift submersible pump for tall cascades and architectural spillways
products.description: Cascade Pro is built for height: a multi-stage hydraulic design delivers strong lift so you keep a full, even sheet of water over a tall waterfall or blade weir without starving the crest. The vortex impeller passes soft solids to resist clogging on planted or natural ponds, and the energy-efficient synchronous motor keeps running costs down on a feature that runs all day. A pre-filter cage protects the impeller, and a generous 10 m cable suits plant-room or remote-sump installation. IPX8 sealed for continuous submersion.
products.image_hint: Larger black cylindrical waterfall pump with wide outlet and protective intake cage, three-quarter view on white

products.title: ClearGuard Inline UV-C Clarifier
products.subtitle: Standalone ultraviolet clarifier to clear green water
products.description: ClearGuard is a standalone inline UV-C unit you plumb between pump and filter to clear suspended single-cell algae, the cause of pea-green water. Pond water flows past a shielded UV-C lamp inside a quartz sleeve, clumping the algae so your filter can trap it. The wipeable quartz sleeve and tool-free end cap make annual lamp changes straightforward, and a viewing port lets you confirm the lamp is lit without opening the housing. Sized by wattage to pond volume for reliable, chemical-free clarity.
products.image_hint: Grey cylindrical inline UV clarifier with hose connections at each end and small viewing window, on white background

products.title: Aurora Ring Fountain Light
products.subtitle: RGBW colour-change ring light for fountains and feature pots
products.description: Aurora is a low-profile submersible ring light that sits under a fountain nozzle or inside a feature pot to up-light moving water from within. Forty-eight RGBW LEDs mix saturated colour and clean white, controlled by an included remote and 12 V transformer with preset scenes and dimming. The sealed IP68 ring is finished in salt-tolerant powder-coated alloy, and a frosted diffuser spreads light evenly rather than showing hot spots. Daisy-chain multiple rings on one transformer for larger features.
products.image_hint: Circular submersible LED ring light glowing blue-purple under water spray, top-down studio shot on white

category.name: Pipes & Fittings
category.description: The pressure-rated backbone of every reliable pool, spa and water-feature installation. Aquora's Pipes & Fittings range covers UV-stabilised PVC-U pipe, ball and check valves, unions, a full library of moulded fittings and professional-grade solvent cement, all sized to metric standards and rated for Gulf operating conditions. Specified by contractors and trusted on villa and hospitality projects across the UAE.

products.title: Aquora FlowCore PVC-U Pressure Pipe (PN16)
products.subtitle: UV-stabilised rigid pipe for plant rooms and buried circulation runs
products.description: Rigid PVC-U pressure pipe engineered for continuous pool and spa circulation duty at up to 16 bar working pressure. The UV-stabilised compound resists the chalking and embrittlement common to exposed plant-room runs under Gulf sun, while the smooth bore minimises friction loss and keeps pump head down. Supplied in 5-metre lengths with plain spigot ends for solvent-weld jointing. Conforms to metric ISO outside diameters for full compatibility with the Aquora fitting range.
products.image_hint: A single 5-metre length of grey rigid PVC pipe on a clean white studio background, plain spigot ends visible, subtle Aquora print line along the pipe.

products.title: Aquora ProSeal True Union Ball Valve
products.subtitle: Double-union isolation valve for serviceable plant-room plumbing
products.description: A double true-union ball valve that isolates a pipe section and unscrews cleanly at both ends for in-line servicing without cutting the pipework. The full-bore PTFE-seated ball gives near-zero flow restriction when open, and the EPDM O-rings are rated for chlorinated and bromine-dosed water. Both union nuts back off independently, so a pump or filter can be removed while the rest of the circuit stays intact. The blue lever doubles as a visual open/closed indicator.
products.material: PVC-U body, PTFE seats, EPDM seals
products.image_hint: A grey PVC true-union ball valve with a blue lever handle, shown at a three-quarter angle on white, union collars clearly visible at both ends.

products.title: Aquora HydroGuard Spring Check Valve
products.subtitle: Non-return valve that stops backflow and protects the pump
products.description: A spring-loaded check valve that allows flow in one direction only, preventing water draining back through the pump when it stops and protecting against back-siphonage in salt-chlorinator and heater circuits. The stainless-spring and EPDM-disc mechanism reseats quietly and reliably, while the transparent inspection cap lets a technician confirm the disc is seating without breaking the joint. Directional flow arrow moulded into the body removes any guesswork at install.
products.material: PVC-U body, EPDM disc, 316 stainless spring
products.image_hint: A grey PVC check valve with a clear transparent inspection cap on top, flow-direction arrow visible on the body, photographed on white.

products.title: Aquora FlowCore PVC Union Connector
products.subtitle: Demountable double-socket union for serviceable joints
products.description: A two-part screwed union that creates a demountable joint anywhere in a solvent-welded run, letting technicians break into the pipework for pump, filter or heater servicing without cutting. The captive EPDM flat seal compresses on a moulded seat for a reliable, repeatable seal, and the coarse buttress thread hand-tightens to full grip with a strap wrench. Both halves are solvent-welded to the pipe, so the only mechanical joint is the serviceable one.
products.image_hint: A grey PVC union fitting in two halves with the threaded collar, shown slightly exploded on a white background to reveal the internal flat seal.

products.title: Aquora FlowCore 90° Solvent Elbow
products.subtitle: Moulded right-angle fitting for tight plant-room routing
products.description: A 90-degree solvent-weld elbow for changing pipe direction in confined plant rooms and around skimmer and return penetrations. The generous internal radius is designed to keep the flow path smooth and reduce turbulence and head loss compared with sharper bends. Moulded to the same ISO metric outside diameters as FlowCore pipe for a deep, square socket and a strong solvent-welded joint. Supplied with both sockets unprinted for clean visible runs.
products.image_hint: A single grey PVC 90-degree elbow fitting photographed on white, both solvent sockets clearly visible, slight top-down angle.

products.title: Aquora FlowCore Reducing Tee
products.subtitle: Branch fitting for tapping returns and dosing lines off a main run
products.description: A solvent-weld tee with a reduced branch outlet, ideal for taking a smaller return, top-up or chemical-dosing line off a larger circulation main. The branch is moulded with a sweep into the main bore to reduce stress concentration and turbulence at the junction. All three sockets are deep-seated to ISO metric tolerances for confident solvent welding. A clean, single-piece moulding eliminates the leak paths you get from cobbling reducers and equal tees together.

specs.label: Configuration
specs.value: Reducing tee (run x run x branch)

products.image_hint: A grey PVC reducing tee fitting with one smaller branch socket, photographed on a white background at a three-quarter angle.

products.title: Aquora FlowCore Male Threaded Adaptor
products.subtitle: Solvent-to-thread transition for pumps, filters and equipment ports
products.description: A transition fitting that solvent-welds to PVC pipe on one end and presents a tapered BSP male thread on the other, for connecting into the threaded ports of pumps, filters, heaters and chlorinators. The reinforced thread collar resists splitting when torqued, and the moulded thread profile is cut to a true BSP taper for a clean seal with PTFE tape. A small but critical part that makes the leap from glued pipework to mechanical equipment connections reliable.
products.image_hint: A grey PVC male threaded adaptor with visible external thread on one end and a solvent socket on the other, on white.

products.title: Aquora BondCore Solvent Cement & Primer Kit
products.subtitle: Professional high-strength cement and primer for pressure joints
products.description: A two-part jointing kit pairing purple cleaning primer with high-strength grey solvent cement formulated for pressure-pipe PVC-U up to 90 mm. The primer softens and cleans the mating surfaces so the cement can chemically fuse pipe and fitting into a single homogeneous joint rather than merely gluing them. Medium-bodied for gap-filling on larger diameters yet fast enough to handle in Gulf temperatures, with each tin supplied with an integral dauber. Always work in ventilated areas and allow full cure before pressure testing.
products.image_hint: Two metal tins side by side on white, one grey-labelled solvent cement and one purple-labelled primer, both with Aquora BondCore branding and brush daubers.

category.name: Covers & Reels
category.description: Engineered pool covers and roller systems built for the demands of the UAE climate. From child-safe mesh and solid safety covers to heat-retaining thermal blankets and corrosion-resistant roller reels, every Aquora cover is specified to cut evaporation, reduce chemical and energy costs, and protect your pool around the clock. Practical kit, properly built, ready for Gulf conditions.

products.title: Aquora Guardian Mesh Safety Cover
products.subtitle: Child-safe tensioned mesh cover anchored to the deck

items.q: Do you deliver across the UAE and the wider GCC?
items.a: Yes. We deliver to every emirate across the UAE as standard, and ship regularly to Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Oman, Bahrain and Kuwait. Smaller items move via tracked courier, while pumps, filters and bulk consumables are dispatched on our own logistics or trusted freight partners. Delivery to mainland UAE addresses is typically within 1-3 working days once an order is confirmed.

items.q: What are your typical lead times and do you hold stock locally?
items.a: Core equipment and consumables from our Aquora house lines are held in our UAE warehouse for same-week dispatch. In-stock items usually ship within 1-2 working days, while made-to-order or larger commercial systems run on a quoted lead time, generally 2-4 weeks. We confirm exact availability at the point of order so you can plan your project with confidence.

items.q: Do you offer installation and commissioning?
items.a: We do. Our certified technicians handle full installation, hydraulic balancing and commissioning for pool, spa, pond and fountain systems across the UAE. Every commissioning includes a performance check, water-balance verification and a handover walkthrough so your system runs correctly from day one. Installation is quoted per project, and we also support your own contractor with technical guidance where preferred.

items.q: What warranty cover do you provide, and are spare parts available?
items.a: All Aquora equipment carries a manufacturer-backed warranty, typically 12 to 24 months depending on the product line, with extended cover available on selected commercial systems. We stock genuine spare parts and wear components locally, so seals, cartridges, impellers and consumables are readily available without long import waits. Keeping spares in-country means faster repairs and minimal downtime for your installation.

items.q: What payment options do you accept?
items.a: We accept bank transfer, all major credit and debit cards, and cash on collection for walk-in orders. Approved contractors and trade accounts can apply for credit terms, typically 30 days, subject to a short approval process. For larger commercial supply, we can structure staged payments tied to delivery and commissioning milestones.

items.q: Are your prices inclusive of VAT?
items.a: Prices are shown exclusive of VAT unless stated otherwise, with 5% UAE VAT applied at checkout and itemised clearly on your invoice. All invoices are fully tax-compliant and include our TRN for your records. GCC export orders are handled under the applicable cross-border rules, which we confirm on the quotation.

items.q: Do you offer bulk or contractor pricing?
items.a: Yes. We run dedicated trade pricing for contractors, consultants and facilities buyers, with tiered discounts that scale to order volume. Registered trade accounts also get priority stock allocation, project-based quotations and a named account contact. Get in touch with your project scope or anticipated annual volume and we will build a tailored rate for you.

Unused items in their original, sealed packaging may be returned within 14 days of delivery for a refund or exchange. Made-to-order, custom-configured and special-import products are non-returnable, and a restocking fee may apply to certain bulk orders. If anything arrives faulty or incorrect, we will replace it promptly at no cost to you, just contact us with your order reference.

items.q: What technical support do you offer after purchase?
items.a: Our technical team is available to help with sizing, troubleshooting, water chemistry and system optimisation, by phone, email or on-site where needed. We provide guidance for both end users and contractors, from selecting the right pump to diagnosing a performance issue. For commercial clients, we also offer scheduled maintenance and service agreements to keep systems running reliably.

items.q: Do you ship outside the UAE?
items.a: Yes. Alongside full UAE coverage, we export across the GCC and to selected wider markets on request. Cross-border orders are quoted with delivery timelines, freight and any applicable duties confirmed upfront, so there are no surprises. Share your destination and requirements and we will advise the most efficient shipping route and lead time.

# About Aquora

## Engineered in Dubai, built for the Gulf

Aquora began with a simple frustration shared by engineers and villa owners alike: too much of the equipment sold into the region's pools and water features was specified on price rather than performance, then left without proper support once the installer had driven away. We started in Dubai to do the opposite — to bring genuinely engineered water systems to the GCC, backed by people who stand behind them.

From a single workshop and showroom, Aquora has grown into a trusted supplier of pool, spa, pond and fountain equipment for residential and commercial projects across the Emirates. Our approach has never changed. We treat every pool as a piece of engineering — a balance of hydraulics, filtration, chemistry and energy — and we specify accordingly. That discipline is what separates water that simply looks clean from water that is genuinely safe, stable and efficient to run in the Gulf climate.

## A complete catalogue, engineered to work together

Our house product lines cover the full water cycle. We supply variable-speed circulation pumps, high-flow sand and cartridge filtration, energy-efficient heat pumps and heating, automated dosing and sanitisation, and precise LED lighting and control systems. Beyond the swimming pool, our range extends to spa and hydrotherapy equipment, pond life-support and filtration, and architectural fountain systems — nozzles, pumps and controls for everything from a courtyard feature to a hotel landmark.

Because we engineer these ranges to operate as one system, components are matched for flow, pressure and chemistry rather than bolted together from whatever was in stock. The result is quieter plant rooms, lower energy bills and water that holds its quality through a Gulf summer.

## Design, build and genuine after-sales support

Alongside supply, our design-and-build arm works with consultants, contractors and private clients from concept to commissioning. We size and lay out plant rooms, model circulation and filtration, integrate automation, and hand over systems that are documented and serviceable — not a mystery to whoever maintains them next.

That commitment continues long after handover. Aquora supplies only authentic equipment, sourced through proper channels, so spares, warranties and performance are exactly what they should be. Our team provides ongoing servicing, parts and technical guidance across the UAE and the wider GCC, supporting clients in Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Oman, Bahrain and Kuwait.

We build water systems to last — and we stay to look after them.

**Talk to Aquora about your project.** Whether you are specifying a single villa pool or a hospitality landmark, our engineers are ready to help.
